# SOM Ready
> Agent-ready publishing infrastructure for web publishers

SOM Ready makes any website readable by AI agents via the SOM open standard.
Publishers add two lines to robots.txt; AI agents get efficient structured pages.

## Badge API (for embedding SOM compliance badges)

To display a SOM compliance badge for any domain:

### Badge URL Pattern
```
https://somready.com/badge/{domain}.svg
```
Example: https://somready.com/badge/bluepages.ai.svg

### Check API (JSON)
```
GET https://somready.com/api/check?domain={domain}
```
Returns JSON: { level: "ready"|"partial"|"none"|"error", directives: {...} }

### Full Report URL
```
https://somready.com/check?d={domain}
```

### Embed Code Templates
Replace {domain} with the actual domain (e.g., example.com):

HTML:
```html
<a href="https://somready.com/check?d={domain}"><img src="https://somready.com/badge/{domain}.svg" alt="SOM Ready" /></a>
```

Markdown:
```markdown
[![SOM Ready](https://somready.com/badge/{domain}.svg)](https://somready.com/check?d={domain})
```

## Key pages
- /: Landing page, snippet generator, pricing
- /check: Domain compliance checker and badge generator
- /docs: Publisher implementation guide
- /badge/{domain}.svg: Dynamic SVG badge for any domain

## APIs
- GET /api/check?domain={domain}: Check SOM compliance
- GET /badge/{domain}.svg: Get compliance badge SVG
- POST /api/waitlist: Join early access waitlist

## Built on
- SOM v1.0 specification: https://somspec.org/spec
- SOM Directives for robots.txt: https://somspec.org/directives
- Reference implementation: https://github.com/plasmate-labs/plasmate
